name: property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, unexpected utility costs cause budget overruns. We provide automated monitoring instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem_solved: Unexpected utility costs due to anomalies in usage.
